# Manuscript Revision Checklist

## Reporting Structure

- [ ] Restructure the prediction study according to the official TRIPOD+AI statement.
- [ ] Download and complete the official TRIPOD+AI checklist for submission.
- [ ] Keep cohort definitions separate for training, internal validation,
      external validation, surgical, LAPC, treatment, bulk RNA-seq, and scRNA-seq cohorts.
- [ ] Define inclusion, exclusion, overlap, treatment era, endpoints, follow-up,
      and missing-data handling for every cohort.
- [ ] Place Materials and Methods after Discussion if required by the journal.

## Technical Methods

- [ ] Report scanner vendor/model, field strength, sequences, and acquisition parameters.
- [ ] Report the exact super-resolution algorithm, implementation, weights,
      parameters, scale factor, and input/output spacing.
- [ ] Report preprocessing, resampling, normalization, segmentation, readers,
      feature extraction, harmonization, and leakage controls.
- [ ] Report hyperparameters, nested validation, calibration, decision curves,
      confidence intervals, survival metrics, and external validation.
- [ ] Describe pathological TSR slide/ROI rules, cutoff basis, heterogeneity,
      specimen type, and reader agreement.
- [ ] Describe sequencing QC, batch correction, markers, enrichment methods,
      and multiple-testing correction.

## Claims and Limitations

- [ ] Present ICI findings as exploratory and hypothesis-generating.
- [ ] Avoid causal claims linking imaging texture directly to cell states.
- [ ] Discuss single-slide pathology and small scRNA-seq/treatment cohorts as limitations.
- [ ] Explain intended clinical use of the TSR score without claiming deployment readiness.

## Journal Formatting

- [ ] Abstract is 180-200 words and states significance.
- [ ] Introduction contains 4-5 focused paragraphs.
- [ ] Use “Figure x”, “Figure Sx”, “Table x”, and “Table Sx”.
- [ ] Place figure legends after References and remove figures from the main text.
- [ ] Add Acknowledgments, Author contributions, Conflicts of interest,
      Data availability, Ethics approval, and Funding information.
- [ ] Include approval numbers or state “Not applicable”.
- [ ] Provide standard China map and map approval number.
- [ ] Upload figures individually as TIFF/PDF, under 10 MB, at least 300 dpi,
      170 mm wide and no higher than 210 mm.
- [ ] Show exact n, individual biological values, error bars, and numbers at risk.
- [ ] Add a Supplementary Information title page.
